summary: Fixed dead keyboard/mouse input reported by operator: the scaffold's project.godot stored input events as JSON-style dictionaries, which Godot 4 silently discards, leaving every action with zero device bindings. Rewrote the [input] section with proper Object(InputEventKey/InputEventMouseButton) serialization and added a smoke check (input_actions_bound) asserting real device events exist, since programmatic Input.action_press() bypasses the InputMap. Smoke now 23/23.
scope: project.godot [input] rewrite, smoke_test.gd binding check, HANDOFF update. No gameplay changes.
next_action: Operator relaunch and playthrough; input should now respond.
